IIIT Lucknow – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, IIIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameIndian Institute of Information Technology, Lucknow
Also Known AsIIITL
Institute TypePublic–Private Partnership
Established2015
LocationLucknow, Uttar Pradesh

IIIT Lucknow: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as IIIT Lucknow and IIITL.

ADDRESS

Indian Institute of Information Technology Lucknow, Chak Ganjaria (C.G. City), Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh - 226002

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow
18 km
Lucknow Junction Railway Station
14.5 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

Information currently unavailable.

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Computer Science
  • Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence
  • Computer Science and Business
  • Information Technology

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹2,000
One-Time Fees₹16,500
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹1,20,000
Other Fees (per Semester)₹3,700
Annual Fees₹3,800
Total₹1,46,000

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Mess Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹2,500
Hostel Charges (per Semester)₹13,000 (Girls 3-seater)
₹21,240 (Boys 2-seater)
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹15,000
Total₹30,500 (Girls 3-seater)
₹38,740 (Boys 2-seater)
